query:
SELECT pc.id,
       pc.categoryName,
       pc.brandName,
       pc.subtypeCode,
       ptc.stationCode,
       ptc.dailyTargetQty,
       ROUND(ptc.baseUnitPoints * 100, 3) AS display_unit_points,
       ptc.active
FROM product_categories pc
LEFT JOIN productivity_target_configs ptc
  ON ptc.categoryId = pc.id
 AND ptc.stationCode = 'B'
 AND ptc.active = 1
WHERE pc.active = 1
  AND pc.categoryName = '智慧型手機'
ORDER BY pc.brandName, ptc.id DESC;

       pc.brandName,
       pc.subtypeCode,
       ptc.stationCode,
       ptc.dailyTargetQty,
       ROUND(ptc.baseUnitPoints * 100, 3) AS display_unit_points,
       ptc.active
FROM product_categories pc
LEFT JOIN productivity_target_configs ptc
  ON ptc.categoryId = pc.id
 AND ptc.stationCode = 'B'
 AND ptc.active = 1
WHERE pc.active = 1
  AND pc.categoryName = '智慧型手機'
ORDER BY pc.brandName, ptc.id DESC;
